title: XR's Tiny Edits
description: This is a small resource pack that fixes thing I dislike about the vanilla textures.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/050753c283842262a4c460cf90004ddeb7c5f696.png)
## **This is a small resource pack that fixes thing I dislike about the vanilla textures.**
### This Resourcepack is compatible with [Respackopt Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts). With this mod, you can disable many different textures
![Every Block change ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c64698e0d045ccec2b8b2d9cfe93d378cb1915a_0.webp)!
![Every Item change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8057ea53583930fcb927278a8171d854ec76b0a9_0.webp)
